debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace α
μ ν : ComplexMeasure α
f : α → ℂ
⊢ ∫ (x : α),
      @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ (μ + ν) x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ (μ + ν) =
    ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ μ x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ μ +
      ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ ν x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ ν

failed_attempts:
rw [h₇, h₈, h₉]
  rw [MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_add h₄ h₅]
  simp_rw [Pi.add_apply]
  rw [integral_add_const_smul]
  ring

· rfl
    · exact hs
  rw [h₉]
  simp_rw [MeasureTheory.integral_add]
  rfl

rw [MeasureTheory.integral_add]
  · rfl
  · exact MeasureTheory.Integrable.mul_const (μ.ang • f) 1
  · exact MeasureTheory.Integrable.mul_const (ν.ang • f) 1

sorry
  have h₁₂ : ∫ x, μ.ang x * f x ∂μ.var = ∫ x, g₁ x * f x ∂λ := by
    sorry
  have h₁₃ : ∫ x, ν.ang x * f x ∂ν.var = ∫ x, g₂ x * f x ∂λ := by
    sorry
  rw [h₁₁, h₁₂, h₁₃]
  rw [integral_add]

ext1 x
    rw [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang]
    rfl
  have h_int_ν : ∫ x, ν.ang x * f x ∂ν.var = ∫ x, g₂ x * f x ∂λ := by
    rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_rn_deriv_mul _ h₆]
    congr 1
    ext1 x
    rw [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang]
    rfl
  have h_int_sum : ∫ x, (μ + ν).ang x * f x ∂(μ + ν).var = ∫ x, g x * f x ∂λ := by
    rw [← MeasureTheory.integral_rn_deriv_mul _ h₇]
    congr 1
    ext1 x
    rw [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang]
    rfl
  rw [h_int_sum, hg, MeasureTheory.integral_add]
  rw [h_int_μ, h_int_ν]
  rfl

exact MeasureTheory.VectorMeasure.variation_add_eq _ _ hs
  rw [h10]
  simp_rw [integral]
  exact BochnerIntegral.add_integral _ _ _
